title.rendered: How to Create a Social Media Playbook

content.rendered: Dive into the art of social media strategy on “Marketing In The Now” with host David Reske and special guest Jenn Foster, Founder and CEO of Foster Marketing. This episode explores the transformative power of a well-crafted social media playbook, especially for businesses like franchises or those with multiple locations. Jenn discusses how a strategic social media playbook ensures consistency in branding and messaging across platforms, thus building a trusted and recognizable brand. From outlining the key components of a successful playbook—including brand voice, visual identity, and engagement strategies—to discussing the balance between local customization and brand coherence, this episode is a deep dive into crafting effective social media campaigns that resonate with both local and global audiences. Jenn also touches on the integration of AI in content creation, emphasizing how technology can enhance human creativity without replacing the authentic connections that are crucial for brand loyalty. Tune in to learn how to leverage these strategies to maintain a compelling and cohesive social media presence that drives engagement and growth.
